Healthy Blackberry bush in the middle of the Rite Aid Parking lot, on a parking lot island. Due to location, I avoided eating the fruit, however, I did take a few cuttings for propagation. Falling Fruit season: June-July.

Large muscadine vine near the split of the trail. Much of the fruit is a little overhead, but there's a fair bit in reach. Keep an eye along the length of the trail, as there are some plants I hope will begin to fruit more in the next few years. Fruit-to-skin/

Persimmon tree next to the sidewalk near the light. Unfortunately I haven't been able to take a close look at this tree to verify, but the orange fruit was unmistakable on my daily commute in the fall. Access: Private but overhanging.
Falling Fruit access: Private but overhanging.
